title: Year Guesser: Music & Entertainment
description: Guess when these iconic cultural moments happened

questions.question: When was the first Star Wars film released?
questions.explanation: Star Wars (A New Hope) was released on May 25, 1977.

questions.question: When did The Beatles break up?
questions.explanation: The Beatles officially split in April 1970 when Paul McCartney announced his departure.

questions.question: When was Netflix founded?
questions.explanation: Netflix was founded in 1997 as a DVD-by-mail service.

questions.question: When did Michael Jackson release 'Thriller'?
questions.explanation: Thriller was released on November 30, 1982 and became the best-selling album ever.

questions.question: When was Disneyland (California) opened?
questions.explanation: Disneyland opened on July 17, 1955 in Anaheim, California.

questions.question: When was the first Harry Potter book published?
questions.explanation: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone was published on June 26, 1997.

questions.question: When did Woodstock music festival take place?
questions.explanation: Woodstock took place August 15–18, 1969 in Bethel, New York.

questions.question: When was YouTube launched?
questions.explanation: YouTube was launched on February 14, 2005. The first video was uploaded in April.

questions.question: When did Elvis Presley die?
questions.explanation: Elvis died on August 16, 1977 at Graceland in Memphis, Tennessee.

questions.question: When was the first Toy Story movie released?
questions.explanation: Toy Story was released on November 22, 1995 — Pixar's first feature film.

questions.question: When did Spotify launch?
questions.explanation: Spotify launched on October 7, 2008 in Sweden.

questions.question: When was the first episode of The Simpsons aired?
questions.explanation: The Simpsons premiered on December 17, 1989 on Fox.

questions.question: When was the first James Bond film (Dr. No) released?
questions.explanation: Dr. No starring Sean Connery was released on October 5, 1962.

questions.question: When did Game of Thrones first air on HBO?
questions.explanation: Game of Thrones premiered on April 17, 2011.

questions.question: When was Instagram launched?
questions.explanation: Instagram launched on October 6, 2010 and gained 25,000 users on day one.
